import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import argparse
import json
import os
import numpy as np

class DKTv3(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=64, hidden_dim=128, num_layers=1, dropout=0.3):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(input_size=embed_dim, hidden_size=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
    
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        x = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        x = self.embed(x)
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(x, lengths.cpu().clamp(min=1), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False)
        output, _ = self.lstm(packed)
        output, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(output, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
        output = self.dropout(output)
        logits = self.fc(output)
        return logits[:, :-1, :]

class DKTv4(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.5, use_gru=False):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.input_ln = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)
        self.input_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        rnn_cls = nn.GRU if use_gru else nn.LSTM
        self.rnn = rnn_cls(input_size=embed_dim, hidden_size=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0)
        self.output_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.output_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.skill_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(num_skills))
    
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        x = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        x = self.embed(x)
        x = self.input_ln(x)
        x = self.input_dropout(x)
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(x, lengths.cpu().clamp(min=1), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False)
        output, _ = self.rnn(packed)
        output, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(output, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
        output = self.output_ln(output)
        output = self.output_dropout(output)
        logits = self.fc(output)
        logits = logits + self.skill_bias.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)
        return logits[:, :-1, :]

class DKTBidir(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim // 2)
        self.correct_embed = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim // 2)
        self.input_ln = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)
        self.input_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(input_size=embed_dim, hidden_size=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True)
        self.output_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.output_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.skill_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(num_skills))
    
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        s_emb = self.skill_embed(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_embed(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.input_ln(x)
        x = self.input_dropout(x)
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(x, lengths.cpu().clamp(min=1), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False)
        output, _ = self.lstm(packed)
        output, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(output, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
        output = self.output_ln(output)
        output = self.output_dropout(output)
        logits = self.fc(output)
        logits = logits + self.skill_bias.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)
        return logits[:, :-1, :]

class DKT2Layer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=256, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.input_ln = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)
        self.input_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(input_size=embed_dim, hidden_size=hidden_dim, num_layers=2, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)
        self.output_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.output_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.skill_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(num_skills))
    
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        x = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        x = self.embed(x)
        x = self.input_ln(x)
        x = self.input_dropout(x)
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(x, lengths.cpu().clamp(min=1), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False)
        output, _ = self.lstm(packed)
        output, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(output, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
        output = self.output_ln(output)
        output = self.output_dropout(output)
        logits = self.fc(output)
        logits = logits + self.skill_bias.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)
        return logits[:, :-1, :]

class DKTLarge(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=192, hidden_dim=384, num_layers=1, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.input_ln = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)
        self.input_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(input_size=embed_dim, hidden_size=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True)
        self.output_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.output_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        self.skill_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(num_skills))
    
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        x = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills
        x = self.embed(x)
        x = self.input_ln(x)
        x = self.input_dropout(x)
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(x, lengths.cpu().clamp(min=1), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False)
        output, _ = self.lstm(packed)
        output, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(output, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
        output = self.output_ln(output)
        output = self.output_dropout(output)
        logits = self.fc(output)
        logits = logits + self.skill_bias.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)
        return logits[:, :-1, :]

def build_model(info, num_skills, device):
    model_class = info.get('model_class', info.get('model_type', 'dktv3'))
    
    if model_class == 'dktv3':
        model = DKTv3(
            num_skills=num_skills,
            embed_dim=info.get('embed_dim', 64),
            hidden_dim=info.get('hidden_dim', 128),
            num_layers=info.get('num_layers', 1),
            dropout=info.get('dropout', 0.3)
        )
    elif model_class == 'dktv4':
        model = DKTv4(
            num_skills=num_skills,
            embed_dim=info.get('embed_dim', 128),
            hidden_dim=info.get('hidden_dim', 256),
            num_layers=info.get('num_layers', 1),
            dropout=info.get('dropout', 0.5),
            use_gru=info.get('use_gru', False)
        )
    elif model_class == 'dktbidir':
        model = DKTBidir(
            num_skills=num_skills,
            embed_dim=info.get('embed_dim', 128),
            hidden_dim=info.get('hidden_dim', 256),
            num_layers=info.get('num_layers', 1),
            dropout=info.get('dropout', 0.5)
        )
    elif model_class == 'dkt2layer':
        model = DKT2Layer(
            num_skills=num_skills,
            embed_dim=info.get('embed_dim', 128),
            hidden_dim=info.get('hidden_dim', 256),
            dropout=info.get('dropout', 0.5)
        )
    elif model_class == 'dktlarge':
        model = DKTLarge(
            num_skills=num_skills,
            embed_dim=info.get('embed_dim', 192),
            hidden_dim=info.get('hidden_dim', 384),
            num_layers=info.get('num_layers', 1),
            dropout=info.get('dropout', 0.5)
        )
    else:
        raise ValueError(f'Unknown model class: {model_class}')
    
    # Handle both key names
    sd = info.get('state_dict', info.get('model_state_dict', None))
    if sd is None:
        raise KeyError(f"No state_dict found. Keys: {list(info.keys())}")
    model.load_state_dict(sd)
    model.to(device)
    model.eval()
    return model

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('--data_path', type=str, required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--checkpoint', type=str, required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--output', type=str, required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')
    
    # Load test data
    test_data = torch.load(os.path.join(args.data_path, 'test.pt'), map_location='cpu')
    skill_ids = test_data['skill_ids'].to(device)
    corrects = test_data['corrects'].to(device)
    lengths = test_data['lengths'].to(device)
    num_skills = int(test_data['num_skills'])
    
    N, T = skill_ids.shape
    
    # Load checkpoint
    checkpoint = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device)
    
    # Check if ensemble or single model
    if isinstance(checkpoint, list):
        # Ensemble
        models = []
        for info in checkpoint:
            model = build_model(info, num_skills, device)
            models.append(model)
        
        # Average predictions
        all_probs = None
        batch_size = 256
        
        for model in models:
            model_probs = []
            with torch.no_grad():
                for start in range(0, N, batch_size):
                    end = min(start + batch_size, N)
                    b_skills = skill_ids[start:end]
                    b_corrects = corrects[start:end]
                    b_lengths = lengths[start:end]
                    
                    logits = model(b_skills, b_corrects, b_lengths)
                    probs = torch.sigmoid(logits)
                    
                    b_next_skills = b_skills[:, 1:]
                    pred_probs = probs.gather(2, b_next_skills.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)
                    model_probs.append(pred_probs.cpu())
            
            model_probs = torch.cat(model_probs, dim=0)
            if all_probs is None:
                all_probs = model_probs
            else:
                all_probs = all_probs + model_probs
        
        all_probs = all_probs / len(models)
    else:
        # Single model
        info = checkpoint
        model = build_model(info, num_skills, device)
        
        all_probs_list = []
        batch_size = 256
        with torch.no_grad():
            for start in range(0, N, batch_size):
                end = min(start + batch_size, N)
                b_skills = skill_ids[start:end]
                b_corrects = corrects[start:end]
                b_lengths = lengths[start:end]
                
                logits = model(b_skills, b_corrects, b_lengths)
                probs = torch.sigmoid(logits)
                
                b_next_skills = b_skills[:, 1:]
                pred_probs = probs.gather(2, b_next_skills.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)
                all_probs_list.append(pred_probs.cpu())
        
        all_probs = torch.cat(all_probs_list, dim=0)
    
    # Create mask and extract predictions
    mask = torch.arange(T - 1).unsqueeze(0) < (lengths.cpu().unsqueeze(1) - 1)
    predictions = all_probs[mask].tolist()
    
    with open(args.output, 'w') as f:
        json.dump({'predictions': predictions}, f)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
